concurrent with an 1115 or 1915(b) managed care authority 
33 = 1915(c) waiver (T-MSIS DD v2.1) 
89 = Two or more 1915(c) waivers in the latest month 
Null/missing = not one of the 1915 waivers, or source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The value is from the last populated '1915C Waiver Type Code'. There are up to 10 waiver type codes 
for 1915(c) waivers in total; i.e., where the monthly waiver type = 06–19 or 33. The value is set to '89'
